# SaaS Starter Kit ‚Äî LLM Context

> This file provides a structured overview of the entire solution for LLM consumption.

## Solution Identity

- **Framework**: ASP.NET Core .NET 10 modular monolith
- **UI**: Swap.Htmx (server-driven HTMX) + DaisyUI 5 + Tailwind CSS v4
- **Database**: SQLite (3-database model) with EF Core
- **Payments**: Paystack (ZAR, 15% VAT inclusive)
- **Auth**: Passwordless magic link + optional TOTP 2FA
- **Solution file**: `saas.sln`, single project at `src/`

## Architecture

Multi-tenant SaaS platform using tenant-per-database isolation with SQLite. Each tenant gets their own database file at `db/tenants/{slug}.db`. Shared platform data lives in `db/core.db`. Audit trail in `db/audit.db`.

Requests to `/{slug}/...` are resolved by `TenantResolutionMiddleware` which sets `ITenantContext` for the request scope. `TenantDbContext` dynamically routes to the correct SQLite file based on the resolved slug.

## Module Inventory

13 modules in `src/Modules/`, each implementing `IModule`:

| Module | Purpose | Key Services |
|--------|---------|-------------|
| Tenancy | Tenant entity, lifecycle, status management | ITenantLifecycleService |
| Auth | Magic link auth, 2FA, sessions, permissions | MagicLinkService, ICurrentUser, TwoFactorService |
| Registration | Tenant signup (free + paid paths) | PendingRegistration, slug validation |
| Billing | Subscriptions, invoicing, payments, usage | IBillingService, PaystackBillingService, VariableChargeService |
| SuperAdmin | Platform admin dashboard | ISuperAdminService, IInfrastructureService |
| FeatureFlags | Plan-gated features via Microsoft.FeatureManagement | IFeatureService, TenantPlanFeatureFilter |
| Dashboard | Tenant landing page | ‚Äî |
| TenantAdmin | Tenant settings, team, roles, billing | ITenantAdminService |
| Audit | Entity change tracking | IAuditWriter, AuditSaveChangesInterceptor |
| Notifications | In-app notification system | INotificationService |
| Marketing | Public pages, pricing, contact, SEO | ‚Äî |
| Litestream | SQLite backup to Cloudflare R2 | ILitestreamStatusService |
| Notes | **Example app module** ‚Äî full CRUD reference | INotesService |

## Shared Interfaces (src/Shared/)

Provider-switching interfaces ‚Äî implementations selected by config:

| Interface | Config Key | Providers |
|-----------|-----------|-----------|
| `IEmailService` | `Email:Provider` | Console, Smtp, MailerSend |
| `IBillingService` | `Billing:Provider` | Mock, Paystack |
| `IBotProtection` | `Turnstile:Provider` | Mock, Cloudflare |
| `IStorageService` | `Storage:Provider` | Local, R2 |
| `IDistributedCache` | `Caching:Provider` | Memory, Redis |
| MassTransit | `Messaging:Provider` | InMemory, RabbitMQ |
| Hangfire | `Hangfire:Storage` | InMemory, SQLite |

Other key interfaces: `ICurrentUser`, `IFeatureService`, `IAuditWriter`, `ILitestreamStatusService`, `IModule`.

## Database Contexts

| Context | Database | Marker Interface | Content |
|---------|----------|-----------------|---------|
| `CoreDbContext` | `db/core.db` | `ICoreEntityConfiguration` | Tenants, Plans, Subscriptions, Invoices, Payments, Features, SuperAdmins |
| `AuditDbContext` | `db/audit.db` | ‚Äî | AuditEntry (auto-tracked entity changes) |
| `TenantDbContext` | `db/tenants/{slug}.db` | `ITenantEntityConfiguration` | Identity (AppUser/AppRole), Permissions, Notes, Notifications, Sessions |

## Request Pipeline

```
Request ‚Üí Compression ‚Üí ForwardedHeaders ‚Üí Serilog ‚Üí SecurityHeaders
  ‚Üí HTTPS ‚Üí WebOptimizer ‚Üí StaticFiles ‚Üí Routing
  ‚Üí TenantResolution ‚Üí RateLimiter ‚Üí Authentication ‚Üí SwapHtmx
  ‚Üí Authorization ‚Üí CurrentUser ‚Üí Controller
```

## Auth System

Dual cookie schemes: `TenantAuth` (`.Tenant.Auth`, 12h) and `SuperAdminAuth` (`.SuperAdmin.Auth`, 24h).

Policies: `"TenantUser"` (has `tenant_slug` claim), `"TenantAdmin"` (+ Admin role), `"SuperAdmin"` (has `is_super_admin` claim).

Controller attributes: `[Authorize(Policy)]`, `[RequireFeature("slug")]`, `[HasPermission("slug")]`.

View tag helpers: `<has-permission>`, `<feature>`.

## Billing Flow

Registration ‚Üí Plan Selection ‚Üí Paystack Checkout ‚Üí Webhook confirms ‚Üí Subscription active.

Recurring: Paystack manages subscription billing. Webhooks update Invoice/Payment records.

Variable charges: `VariableChargeService` calculates seat + usage overage, generates invoice, calls `charge_authorization` on stored card. Handles 2FA challenge, success, failure ‚Üí dunning.

## Tenant Provisioning

12-step process: validate slug ‚Üí create Tenant ‚Üí create Subscription ‚Üí create SQLite DB ‚Üí migrate ‚Üí sync Litestream ‚Üí create roles ‚Üí seed permissions ‚Üí map role permissions ‚Üí SeedTenantAsync per module ‚Üí create admin user ‚Üí publish TenantCreatedEvent. Full rollback on failure.

## Configuration

All config in `appsettings.json` with environment overrides. Key sections: Site, ConnectionStrings, SuperAdmin, Tenancy, Email, Billing (with Paystack, Tax, Company, Invoice, Trial, GracePeriod, Features, UsageMetrics), Turnstile, Litestream, Storage, Messaging, Caching (with TTL), Hangfire, RateLimiting, Infrastructure, DevSeed.

See `docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` for complete reference.

## File Structure Convention

```
src/Modules/{Module}/
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ {Module}Module.cs        # IModule implementation
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Controllers/             # MVC controllers (SwapController base)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Data/                    # EF configurations (marker interfaces)
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Entities/                # Domain entities
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Events/                  # SwapEventSource + domain events
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ Services/                # Interface + implementation
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ Views/                   # Razor views (HTMX partials)
```

## Key Patterns

- **SwapController** ‚Äî base class with `SwapView()` and `SwapResponse()` builders for HTMX
- **Source-generated events** ‚Äî `[SwapEventSource]` generates type-safe event constants
- **PaginatedList<T>** ‚Äî standard pagination via `.ToPaginatedListAsync(page, size)`
- **IAuditableEntity** ‚Äî auto-tracked `CreatedAt`, `UpdatedAt`, `CreatedBy`, `UpdatedBy`
- **[AuditIgnore]** ‚Äî opt-out property from audit trail
- **ModuleFeature** ‚Äî `(slug, name, description, minPlanSlug)` for feature gating
- **ModulePermission** ‚Äî `(slug, group, description)` for RBAC

## Testing

- Unit tests: `tests/saas.UnitTests/` ‚Äî xUnit, in-memory SQLite, private nested stubs
- Integration tests: `tests/saas.IntegrationTests/` ‚Äî WebApplicationFactory
- Pattern: services tested against real DB; controllers via service stubs

## Documentation Index

- `docs/ARCHITECTURE-OVERVIEW.md` ‚Äî Full architecture with diagrams
- `docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md` ‚Äî Every config section documented
- `docs/DEVELOPMENT-GUIDE.md` ‚Äî How to add modules, entities, jobs, events
- `docs/BILLING-ENGINE.md` ‚Äî Billing system deep dive
- `docs/BILLING-IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE.md` ‚Äî Medical practice billing example
- Each module has a `README.md` in its directory
